# Bundled third-party assets

All assets below are bundled locally (no CDN) and are GPL-compatible.

## Leaflet 1.9.4
- Files: `leaflet/leaflet.js`, `leaflet/leaflet.css`, `leaflet/images/*`
- License: BSD-2-Clause
- Source: https://leafletjs.com/ — https://github.com/Leaflet/Leaflet
- Note: map tiles are loaded at runtime from OpenStreetMap (see the plugin readme's "External Services" section).

## Sora (latin subset, variable)
- File: `fonts/files/sora.woff2`
- License: SIL Open Font License 1.1 (OFL)
- Source: https://fonts.google.com/specimen/Sora

## Plus Jakarta Sans (latin subset, variable)
- File: `fonts/files/plus-jakarta-sans.woff2`
- License: SIL Open Font License 1.1 (OFL)
- Source: https://fonts.google.com/specimen/Plus+Jakarta+Sans
